name: ivyhouse-terminal-pty
description: PTY-native Codex/Copilot terminal runtime with multi-session state, verify, smoke, and backend-aware logs.

commands.title: IvyHouse PTY: Send Text to Codex PTY
IvyHouse PTY: Send Text to Codex PTY
IvyHouse PTY: Send Text to Copilot PTY
IvyHouse PTY: Submit in Codex PTY
IvyHouse PTY: Submit in Codex PTY
IvyHouse PTY: Submit in Copilot PTY
IvyHouse PTY: Run Codex PTY Smoke Test
IvyHouse PTY: Run Codex PTY Smoke Test
IvyHouse PTY: Run Copilot PTY Smoke Test

ivyhouseTerminalPty.autoStart.description: Legacy alias for Codex autoStart. Prefer ivyhouseTerminalPty.autoStartCodex and ivyhouseTerminalPty.autoStartCopilot.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.autoStartCodex.description: Automatically start the Codex PTY terminal on VS Code startup.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.autoStartCopilot.description: Automatically start the Copilot PTY terminal on VS Code startup.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.codexCommand.description: Command used to launch Codex inside the PTY bridge.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.copilotCommand.description: Command used to launch Copilot inside the PTY bridge.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.codexTerminalName.description: Visible terminal name for the PTY-native Codex session.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.copilotTerminalName.description: Visible terminal name for the PTY-native Copilot session.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.captureDir.description: Workspace-relative directory used for live transcript and debug logs.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.rotateArtifactsOnSta.description: Rotate current PTY artifacts before starting a new backend session.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.rotateArtifactsOnRes.description: Rotate current PTY artifacts after close barrier succeeds and before restarting a backend session.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.rotateArtifactsOnNew.description: Allow ivyhouseTerminalPty.rotateArtifacts to rotate current artifacts at the start of a new workflow task.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.rotationMaxHistory.description: How many rotated PTY artifact generations to keep per backend and file type.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.codexVerifyPrompt.description: Prompt used by the Codex verify command.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.codexVerifyExpected.description: Expected substring used to confirm Codex verify success.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.copilotVerifyPrompt.description: Prompt used by the Copilot verify command.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.copilotVerifyExpecte.description: Expected substring used to confirm Copilot verify success.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.copilotCloseForceKil.description: Fallback force-kill delay in milliseconds for Copilot PTY sessions.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.verifyTimeoutMs.description: Idle timeout in milliseconds for verify and smoke operations. The waiter is extended when Codex continues emitting meaningful progress output.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.verifyMaxTimeoutMs.description: Overall cap in milliseconds for verify and smoke operations, even if progress output continues.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.startupTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds to wait for the PTY session to become writable after start/restart.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.startupReadyDebounce.description: Debounce in milliseconds after semantic startup-ready markers are observed before the first prompt is allowed through.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.startupSettledSilenc.description: Legacy alias for startup debounce. Use ivyhouseTerminalPty.startupReadyDebounceMs for new configuration.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.smokeIterationCount.description: Number of fresh PTY sessions to exercise during a smoke test run. Each iteration must independently reach startup-ready before prompts are sent.

ivyhouseTerminalPty.maxRetryCount.description: Maximum number of retry attempts before upgrading to rebuild.
